subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and the God of Names, Creator of the heavens! I beseech Thee by Thy Command whereby arose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک بامرک الذی به قام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
